prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9f669b64`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_9f669b64` end-to-end. The rule I used is: pick the mover as the object with the smallest longer bbox side, reflect it across the regular bar/rectangle destination with border clamping, split that destination into two equal halves shifted outward by one cell, and leave the third object unchanged. I discarded the `sonnet45` hint because it described a generic swap and missed this specific split-and-reflect structure; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f669b64/notes.md#L1).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f669b64/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f669b64/verifier.py#L1), [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f669b64/helpers.py#L76), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f669b64/generator.py#L35). I kept everything task-local; no new primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

Validation passed on all official train examples and the provided test output, then I built 1000 examples with the shared builder. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f669b64/task.json), [examples/](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f669b64/examples), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f669b64/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f669b64/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f669b64/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f669b64/previews/preview_03.png). I also sanity-checked the generated preview output after the build.
